lead_scoring.description: Weights and thresholds for AI lead scoring (1-10 scale)

likelihood_to_buy_diverted.description: How likely is this retailer to purchase diverted/gray market goods?
signals: Independent retailer without strict MAP enforcement (positive)
Carries premium brands but at below-MSRP pricing (strong positive)
Part of a large corporate chain with compliance teams (strong negative)

brand_overlap.description: How many of YOUR brands do they already carry or would logically want?
signals: Carries 5+ of your brands already (strong positive)
Carries competing brands in same tier (moderate positive)
Category match but no brand overlap (neutral — potential new customer)

store_size_and_type.description: Is this the right type and size of retailer?
signals: Large chain store (too risky — compliance issues)

accessibility.description: How easy is it to reach and do business with this retailer?

disqualification_rules: Retailer is a major chain (Sephora, Ulta, Nordstrom, Macy's, etc.)
Retailer is Amazon, eBay, or other major marketplace
Website is clearly a scam or non-functional
Retailer only sells products in categories you don't carry
Retailer is in a restricted/sanctioned geography
